problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region — specifically Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.
